zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Leete於1648年3月24日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特時，她的父親Governor William Leete, Sr.34歲，母親Anne Payne11645歲。她於1671年10月26日與Reverend John Woodbridge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1711年4月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德希姆斯波利享年63歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德希姆斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Leete于1648年3月24日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特时，她的父亲Governor William Leete, Sr.34岁，母亲Anne Payne11645岁。她于1671年10月26日与Reverend John Woodbridge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1711年4月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德希姆斯波利享年63岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德希姆斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Leete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: An early American bearer of this name was one of the founders ofGuilford, CT. William Leete (c. 1613–83), a colonial governorof New Haven colony and CT, was born at Dodington, Huntingtonshire,England. He converted to Puritanism and sailed for America to escapepersecution in May 1639.

variants.name: Leet
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a watercourse orroad junction, Old English gelǣt, or a habitational namefrom Leat in Devon, or The Leete in Essex, named with this element.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

variants.name: Abygail
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: New Haven County was created on 10 May 1666, and was named for an English port town called Newhaven, London, England

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Leete was born on 24 March 1648, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Governor William Leete, Sr., was 34 and her mother, Anne Payne, was 11645. She married Reverend John Woodbridge on 26 October 1671, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 9 April 1711, in Simsbury, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63, and was buried in Simsbury, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Leeteが1648年3月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードで生まれた時，父Governor William Leete, Sr.は34歳，母Anne Payneは11645歳であった。1671年10月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードでReverend John Woodbridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1711年4月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードシムスブリーで63歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードシムスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Leete(이)가 1648년 3월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Governor William Leete, Sr.(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Payne(은)는 11645세였다. 그녀는 1671년 10월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 Reverend John Woodbridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1711년 4월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 사임스버이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 사임스버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Leete родилась 24 марта 1648 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Governor William Leete, Sr. было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Payne, 11645. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reverend John Woodbridge 26 октября 1671 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 9 апреля 1711 г. в местности симсбури, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности симсбури, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Leete nació el 24 de marzo de 1648, en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Governor William Leete, Sr., tenía 34 años y su mamá, Anne Payne, tenía 11645 años. Se casó con Reverend John Woodbridge el 26 de octubre de 1671, en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de abril de 1711, en Simsbury, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Simsbury, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
